hero.title: Happy Anniversary, my love 💖
hero.subtitle: It's not just a date… it's everything we've been through together ✨

emotionalAnchor: This isn't just an anniversary… it's a reminder of everything we survived, grew through, and became together 💭

letter.opening: My Fay Fay 💖, my chargie, my moama…
paragraphs: Another year with you feels unreal when I really stop and think about it. It feels like a gift wrapped in small, holy moments—the sort of love that feels protected by grace.
What we have is not just time passing. It is a quiet unfolding, a steady weaving of our lives into something more beautiful and more sacred than I ever imagined.
I remember the beginning not because it was perfect, but because it was honest. Each imperfect step led us closer to a love that is real, tender, and faithful.
You are not just part of my life. You are part of my memories, my thoughts, my calm, and the prayers I whisper when the world feels loud.
My chargie 💞… I have seen you grow in ways that made my heart ache with gratitude. There is beauty in your patience, strength in your softness, and faith in the way you keep choosing love.
Moama 💐… the nickname became a promise. It reminds me that you are a gift, a sanctuary, a person around whom I can breathe easier.
Aunty 😌💖… it is funny and it is warm. It is the comfort of knowing someone knows me well enough to still laugh with me, still understand me, still stand beside me.
Big head 😌💞… yes, still with love. Even your stubbornness and your flare became a part of what makes you uniquely you. That same fire is what makes you fierce for the people you love.
I have held your quiet tears and your loudest laughter, and both have taught me that love is not only romance—it is mercy, patience, and constant choosing.
We have grown through things I cannot always name. The hard nights, the small reconciliations, the gentle forgiveness—those are the moments that shape us.
It is not perfection, but persistence. Not fantasy, but presence. In every ordinary afternoon and every shared silence, I see a love that feels like prayer.
So today, I want to say thank you for staying. Thank you for believing in us when the road felt uncertain. Thank you for choosing to move forward with me.
I hope we keep growing into better versions of ourselves, individually and together. I hope our love becomes a refuge, a place of healing, and a home.
And I hope you never forget how deeply you are seen—how deeply you are valued, honored, and held in my heart.
To me, you have never been invisible. Not for a single moment. You are treasured, loved, and irreplaceable.
Happy anniversary, my love. May this year feel gentler, truer, and more blessed than the last.
prayers: I pray that our love stays rooted in grace, so that even when seasons change, we still choose kindness and forgiveness.
I pray God keeps guiding us toward honesty, humility, and a humility that makes room for one another's hearts.
I pray that every step we take together is guarded, blessed, and illuminated by a peace that comes from something greater than both of us.
careerGoals: To step into places where your gifts are honored, your voice is heard, and your compassion becomes your strength.
To build a future where your work feels meaningful, sustainable, and aligned with the values that matter most to you.
To keep dreaming of work that allows you to care deeply without losing yourself, to lead with calm and confidence.
wishes: I wish for us to keep choosing each other long after the easy page turns.
I wish for a kind of peace in our home that feels like a soft prayer spoken aloud.
I wish the next years bring us more laughter, more quiet certainty, and more joy in the simple things we share.
